personal.name: Kundan Patil
personal.tagline: Product-Focused Developer — building clean, performant applications.
personal.shortIntro: I design and build web experiences that are fast, accessible, and delightful. I specialize in React, Java, and full-stack development with a focus on clean architecture and user experience.

bio: Hi, I'm Kundan — a Computer Science student at NMIMS University with a strong passion for building software that solves real problems.
I work across the full stack, from React frontends to Java backends and AI-powered systems. I enjoy the intersection of clean code, thoughtful design, and robust architecture.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source, or organizing tech events at my university.

values.title: Clean Architecture
values.description: I believe great software starts with clear structure. I prioritize maintainable, modular code.

values.title: User-First Design
values.description: Every feature should serve the user. I build interfaces that are intuitive and accessible.

values.title: Continuous Learning
values.description: Technology evolves fast. I stay curious and keep learning through courses, papers, and projects.

achievements: Organizing Committee, Web Dev Department, Coding Club, NMIMS
Organizing Committee, Technical Department, Ambiora Tech Fest, NMIMS

projects.title: LocalServe
projects.subtitle: Local Services Marketplace Platform
projects.summary: A hyperlocal service marketplace connecting customers with verified professionals, featuring real-time discovery and secure booking.

detail.challenge: Small businesses and service providers often lack online visibility. Customers struggle to find trusted local professionals for home services, repairs, and other needs.
detail.role: Full-Stack Developer — designed and built the complete platform from architecture to deployment.
detail.approach: Built a comprehensive React frontend with a custom design system, integrated Firebase for authentication and real-time data, and implemented Leaflet.js for location-based provider discovery.
detail.outcome: Engineered a secure two-way booking completion system with role-based access control. Implemented responsive, accessible UI that improved user engagement and platform usability.
features: Real-time location-based provider discovery with Leaflet.js
Role-based access control (RBAC) for transaction integrity
Responsive, accessible UI with custom design system

projects.title: SearchXplore
projects.subtitle: High-Performance Local File Search Engine
projects.summary: A desktop file search engine achieving ~50,000 files/second indexing throughput with intelligent ranking and real-time monitoring.

detail.challenge: Existing file search tools are slow and return poorly ranked results, especially on large file systems with millions of files.
detail.role: Solo Developer — designed the architecture, search algorithms, and built the desktop application.
detail.approach: Leveraged Java 21 Virtual Threads for parallel directory traversal, Apache Lucene for indexing, and implemented a custom multi-factor ranking algorithm.
detail.outcome: Achieved ~50,000 files/second indexing throughput with sub-100ms query response times across millions of files.
features: Multi-threaded file crawler with Java Virtual Threads (~50K files/sec)
Custom multi-factor ranking algorithm (relevance, recency, depth, size, type)
Real-time file system monitoring via Java WatchService
Insights dashboard with duplicate file detection and storage analytics

projects.title: Document QA System
projects.subtitle: Enterprise RAG-Powered Document Analysis
projects.summary: An AI-powered document analysis system using RAG to enable natural language querying of complex enterprise documentation.

detail.challenge: Enterprise teams waste significant time searching through large document repositories. Traditional keyword search fails with complex, context-dependent queries.
detail.role: Full-Stack AI Developer — designed the retrieval pipeline, API, and frontend interface.
detail.approach: Implemented Retrieval-Augmented Generation using sentence-transformers for semantic embedding and Google Gemini for context-aware answer synthesis.
detail.outcome: Significantly reduced time to access critical information within large datasets through efficient vector similarity search and context-aware responses.
features: Robust data pipeline with sentence-transformers for semantic embedding
Google Gemini integration for context-aware answer synthesis
Natural language querying of complex enterprise documentation
